prompt: Write a 300-word cold email to a Series A investor at a top-tier firm (a16z, Sequoia, Founders Fund, Index, Accel). Subject line: 5-LOCK monopoly in 5 minutes. Body: opens with a one-line stat, then explains the 5-LOCK (Rex/Atlas/Nova/Marcus/Sage), names the 27 .ai domain portfolio + 4 white-label apps, ends with a 2-line ask. Tone: confident, specific, low-fluff. Return ONLY JSON: {subject:string, body:string}.
